title: Farm Birthday Decorations Set, 40Inch Number 1 Balloon with Cow & Tractor Foils, Farmyard Animals Theme Party Supplies
features: 40Inch Giant Number 1 Centrepiece - Oversized foil balloon (3x larger than standard) creates stunning focal point for 1st birthday cakes and photo walls.
Farmyard Animal Collection - Includes 25inch cow foil, 25inch tractor foil, 25inch star + 25/12inch cow print balloons for layered decorations.
Durable Double-Sided Foil - Thicker 0.3mm metallic material resists punctures (not latex), holds helium for 12+ hours.
Complete Farm Theme Kit - Combines number balloons + animal motifs for barnyard backdrops, dessert tables and party entrance arches.
Quick Inflation System - Standard nozzle works with air pumps/hand pumps; straw included for smaller balloons.
